---
format:
  pdf:
    fig-align: center
    geometry:
      - top=1mm
      - bottom=1mm
      - left=1mm
      - right=1mm
    papersize: a4
execute: 
  echo: false
  error: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  faltid: NA
  dat: NA
  lankod: "Östergötlands"
  datasource: "slinga"
  landscape_p2: false
  directory: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.providers)
library(mapview)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
#| label: "load data"
#| include: false

loadNamespace("surveymapR")
counties <- get("counties", envir = asNamespace("surveymapR"))
lokaler  <- get("lokaler",  envir = asNamespace("surveymapR"))

if (is.na(params$dat)) {
  dat <- lokaler
} else {
  first_line <- readLines(params$dat, n = 1)
  sep <- ifelse(grepl(";", first_line), ";", ",")
  dat <- read_delim(params$dat, delim = sep, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

tmp <- dat %>%
  filter(sit_aggregated == params$faltid) %>% 
  mutate(geo_geom = structure(geo_geom, class = "WKB"),
         geometry = st_as_sfc(geo_geom, EWKB = TRUE, crs = 3006)) %>% 
  select(SiteID = sit_uid, SiteText = sit_name, segment = geo_seg_sequence, geometry) %>% 
  st_sf() %>% 
  st_cast() %>% 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

LAN <- counties %>% 
  filter(str_detect(LNNAMN, params$lankod)) %>% 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

sitelabel <- tmp %>% 
  mutate(SiteText = str_remove(SiteText, " slinga.*| transekter.*")) %>% 
  distinct(SiteText) %>% 
  pull()

# Display mode is determined by datasource in render_map() and passed as a string:
#   "slinga"          — all features are slingor (no name parsing needed)
#   "slinga_transekt" — features distinguished by sit_name keyword ("transekt"/"sling")
#                       TODO: replace name-based split with a proper data model column
#   "transekt"        — all features are transekter (no name parsing needed)
display_mode <- params$datasource

if (display_mode == "slinga_transekt") {
  # For these datasources, site names carry the type suffix ("transekt"/"slinga")
  # as a data model convention — split on that until a dedicated column exists
  trans <- tmp %>% filter(str_detect(SiteText, "transekt"))
  sling <- tmp %>% filter(str_detect(SiteText, "sling"))
} else if (display_mode == "transekt") {
  trans <- tmp
  sling <- tmp[0, ]  # empty sf with correct schema
} else {
  # "slinga" — all features are slingor, no name parsing required
  sling <- tmp
  trans <- tmp[0, ]  # empty sf with correct schema
}
```

```{r}
#| label: "Make data elements"

# Overall bounding box (used for overview map)
bbo <- tmp %>% st_bbox()

# Centroid of overall bbox
cent <- st_as_sfc(bbo, crs = st_crs(4326)) %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  st_coordinates()

pad <- 0.0005  # ~50m padding in degrees

# Endpoints of slinga
if (nrow(sling) > 0) {
  if (ncol(sling %>% st_coordinates()) > 3) {
    slingend <- sling %>% st_coordinates() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      group_by(L2) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
  } else {
    slingend <- sling %>% st_coordinates() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      group_by(L1) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
  }
} else {
  slingend <- data.frame(X = numeric(0), Y = numeric(0))
}

# Endpoints of transekt
if (nrow(trans) > 0) {
  if (ncol(trans %>% st_coordinates()) > 3) {
    transend <- trans %>% st_coordinates() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      group_by(L2) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
  } else {
    transend <- trans %>% st_coordinates() %>% as.data.frame() %>%
      group_by(L1) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
  }
} else {
  transend <- data.frame(X = numeric(0), Y = numeric(0))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: "Slingelement"
#| include: !expr nrow(sling) > 0 && !isTRUE(params$landscape_p2)
#| fig-pos: "!"
#| out-width: "100%"

if (nrow(sling) > 0) {
  bbo_sling <- st_bbox(sling)
  m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,
                                        attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
    fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["xmin"]) - pad,
              lat1 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["ymin"]) - pad,
              lng2 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["xmax"]) + pad,
              lat2 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["ymax"]) + pad) %>%
    addPolylines(data = sling, color = "#ffff31",
                 label = sling$segment,
                 labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "16px",
                                             noHide = TRUE,
                                             style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                                          background = rgb(255,255,255,0,maxColorValue = 255),
                                                          color = "white")),
                 opacity = 0.6, weight = 5) %>%
    addCircleMarkers(data = slingend, lng = ~X, lat = ~Y,
                     radius = 7, color = "orange",
                     stroke = FALSE, fillOpacity = 1) %>% 
    addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))

  mapshot2(m,
           url  = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
           file = glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"),
           remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton",
                               "drawToolbar","easyButton"),
           vwidth = 800, vheight = 900)

  library(magick)
  img    <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))
  iw     <- image_info(img)$width
  header <- image_blank(iw, 60L, color = "white") %>%
    image_annotate(paste("Slingor", sitelabel),
                   size = 36, weight = 700, color = "black",
                   gravity = "West", location = "+16+0")
  img <- image_append(c(header, img), stack = TRUE)
  image_write(img, glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))
}

if (nrow(sling) > 0 && !isTRUE(params$landscape_p2)) knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))
```

```{r}
#| label: "Transektelement"
#| include: !expr nrow(trans) > 0
#| fig-pos: "!"
#| out-width: "100%"

if (nrow(trans) > 0) {
  bbo_trans <- st_bbox(trans)
  m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,
                                        attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
    fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["xmin"]) - pad,
              lat1 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["ymin"]) - pad,
              lng2 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["xmax"]) + pad,
              lat2 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["ymax"]) + pad) %>%
    addPolylines(data = trans, color = "#b7c9e2",
                 label = trans$segment,
                 noClip = TRUE,
                 labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "16px",
                                             noHide = TRUE,
                                             style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                                          background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                                                          color = "white")),
                 opacity = 0.8, weight = 6) %>% 
    addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))

  mapshot2(m,
           url  = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
           file = glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"),
           remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton",
                               "drawToolbar","easyButton"),
           vwidth = 800, vheight = 900)

  library(magick)
  img    <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))
  iw     <- image_info(img)$width
  header <- image_blank(iw, 60L, color = "white") %>%
    image_annotate(paste("Transekter", sitelabel),
                   size = 36, weight = 700, color = "black",
                   gravity = "West", location = "+16+0")
  img <- image_append(c(header, img), stack = TRUE)
  image_write(img, glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))
}

if (nrow(trans) > 0) knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))
```

```{r}
#| label: "Översikt och transekter"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| include: true

# Render Overview map
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = TRUE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2], zoom = 12) %>%
  addMarkers(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2]) %>% 
  {if(nrow(sling)>0) addPolylines(., data = sling, color = "orange", weight = 2.5) else .} %>%
  {if(nrow(trans)>0) addPolylines(., data = trans, color = "orange", weight = 2.5) else .} %>% 
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(lng = bbo["xmax"] + 0.05, lat = bbo["ymax"] + 0.02,
                      label = sitelabel,
                      labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "40px", noHide = TRUE,
                        style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                     "background-color" = "white",
                                     "border-color" = "transparent",
                                     "box-shadow" = "none"))) %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Overview.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 750, vheight = 750)

# Render County map
m <- leaflet(LAN, options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = TRUE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>% 
  addPolylines(color = "red", weight = 4) %>% 
  addMarkers(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2],
             label = sitelabel,
             labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "22px", noHide = TRUE,
                                         offset = c(15, -45),
                                         style = list("font-weight" = "bold"))) %>% 
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Lan.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 750, vheight = 750)

# Render combined slingor + transekter aerial map
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
  fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo["xmin"]),
            lat1 = as.numeric(bbo["ymin"]),
            lng2 = as.numeric(bbo["xmax"]),
            lat2 = as.numeric(bbo["ymax"])) %>%
  {if(nrow(sling)>0) addPolylines(., data = sling, color = "#ffff31", label = sling$segment,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "12px", noHide = TRUE,
                 style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                              background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                              color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.8, weight = 5) else .} %>%
  {if(nrow(trans)>0) addPolylines(., data = trans, color = "#b7c9e2", label = trans$segment,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "12px", noHide = TRUE,
                 style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                              background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                              color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.8, weight = 6) else .} %>%
  {if(nrow(slingend)>0) addCircleMarkers(., data = slingend, lng = ~X, lat = ~Y,
                   radius = 7, color = "orange", stroke = FALSE, fillOpacity = 1) else .} %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingor.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 900, vheight = 700)

# Composite: side-by-side top row (Overview + County) + full-width bottom row
library(magick)
ov  <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Overview.png"))
lan <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Lan.png"))
bot <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingor.png"))

h <- 750L
ov  <- image_resize(ov,  glue("x{h}"))
lan <- image_resize(lan, glue("x{h}"))
h_gap   <- image_blank(30L, h, color = "white")
top_row <- image_append(c(ov, h_gap, lan), stack = FALSE)

top_w <- image_info(top_row)$width
bot   <- image_resize(bot, glue("{top_w}x"))

gap      <- image_blank(top_w, 20L, color = "white")
combined <- image_append(c(top_row, gap, bot), stack = TRUE)
image_write(combined, glue("{params$directory}/OverviewPage.png"))

knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/OverviewPage.png"))
```

```{r}
#| label: "landscape-geometry"
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

if (isTRUE(params$landscape_p2)) {
  # Render the combined aerial map at landscape dimensions
  m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
    fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo["xmin"]),
              lat1 = as.numeric(bbo["ymin"]),
              lng2 = as.numeric(bbo["xmax"]),
              lat2 = as.numeric(bbo["ymax"])) %>%
    {if(nrow(sling)>0) addPolylines(., data = sling, color = "#ffff31", label = sling$segment,
                 labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "12px", noHide = TRUE,
                   style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                                color = "white")),
                 opacity = 0.8, weight = 5) else .} %>%
    {if(nrow(slingend)>0) addCircleMarkers(., data = slingend, lng = ~X, lat = ~Y,
                     radius = 7, color = "orange", stroke = FALSE, fillOpacity = 1) else .} %>%
    addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = FALSE))

  mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
           file = glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingorLandscape.png"),
           remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
           vwidth = 1200, vheight = 850)

  # Add header strip with site name
  library(magick)
  img    <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingorLandscape.png"))
  iw     <- image_info(img)$width
  header <- image_blank(iw, 60L, color = "white") %>%
    image_annotate(paste("Slingor", sitelabel),
                   size = 36, weight = 700, color = "black",
                   gravity = "West", location = "+16+0")
  img <- image_append(c(header, img), stack = TRUE)
  image_write(img, glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingorLandscape.png"))

  # Write the landscape image as a standalone A4 landscape PDF and merge
  library(magick)
  img_ls <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingorLandscape.png"))

  # Resize to A4 landscape at 150dpi (297×210mm = 1754×1240px at 150dpi)
  img_ls <- image_resize(img_ls, "1754x1240!")

  landscape_pdf <- glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingorLandscape.pdf")
  image_write(img_ls, landscape_pdf, format = "pdf", density = 150)

  # After the main PDF is written, merge via pdftools in render_locals()
  # Signal the merge is needed by writing a flag file
  writeLines(landscape_pdf, glue("{params$directory}/.landscape_merge"))
}
```
